name: Australia
description: Perfect for road trips, surfing, and the ultimate adventure in the Outback.

name: Thailand
description: Stunning islands, ornate temples, and some of the best street food in the world.

name: Portugal
description: Amazing surfing coastlines, historic cities, and a very laid-back atmosphere.

name: Vietnam
description: Breathtaking landscapes like Ha Long Bay and a deeply fascinating culture.

name: Canada
description: A paradise for outdoor enthusiasts: vast national parks, mountains, and crystal-clear lakes.

name: Spain
description: Vibrant cities, fantastic tapas, and endless sunshine along the Costa Brava.

name: New Zealand
description: The home of Middle-earth – dramatic nature, fjords, and perfect for van life.

name: Bali (Indonesia)
description: Spiritual temples, lush rice terraces, and a huge digital nomad community.

name: Mexico
description: White Caribbean beaches, ancient Maya ruins, and an incredible zest for life.
